name: both_flags_squeeze_fires_once
description: para_armed=True AND breakeven_locked=True. The squeeze multiplier must fire EXACTLY ONCE (not twice). Output identical to fixtures 07 and 08. Catches a buggy impl that double-multiplies when both flags are set (e.g., `if para_armed: active *= sq; if breakeven_locked: active *= sq`).
derivation: safe_vol = 2.0. raw = 3.0. max(3.0, 0.30) = 3.0. (para_armed OR breakeven_locked) is True -> active *= 0.5 ONCE = 1.5. Output = 1.5. A double-multiplication bug would yield 0.75 (3.0 * 0.5 * 0.5).
